source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Structured 8px productivity grids, culm-segment navigation, leaf-angle dividers, compact task panels, and dashboard surfaces with disciplined vertical rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent Bamboo Forest motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma source
Primary request: Create only a bamboo forest motif for a Morphous design-system asset, isolated full subject, no environment beyond the grouped bamboo grove subject, no props, no text.
Subject: A structured landscape cutout of a monsoon bamboo grove: several vertical green segmented bamboo culms, straw-light node highlights, fine leaf clusters, a few young shoot accents, layered shadow passages between culms, humid monsoon grove texture, precise culm rings, and a disciplined architectural rhythm suitable for a structured productivity system.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show a compact grove cluster with vertical culms and leaf canopy fragments; do not crop culm segments, leaves, or shoot tips. Vertical-to-square composition suitable for later transparent PNG extraction.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves smooth culm texture, node rings, leaf edges, straw light, green culm color, and deep grove shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform magenta color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no animals, no person, no pot, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Bamboo Forest" with slug morphous-bamboo-forest, derived from a monsoon bamboo forest motif.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Motif source: bamboo forest in a monsoon grove: vertical green culms, straw light through leaves, repeating culm nodes, shadowed grove depth, disciplined natural rhythm. The system feel is a structured productivity system.
Required visible sections: Bamboo Forest, Monsoon Grove, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, simple icon treatment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style productivity system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, culm-segment navigation, leaf-angle dividers, structured calm workflow surfaces.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: green culm, leaf green, straw light, pale cane, monsoon mist, wet earth shadow, deep grove ink, culm gold.
Composition: light straw background, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Bamboo Forest", no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Bamboo Forest" with slug morphous-bamboo-forest. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Motif source: bamboo forest in a monsoon grove: vertical green culms, straw light through leaves, repeating culm nodes, shadowed grove depth, disciplined natural rhythm. The system feel is a structured productivity system. Preserve the light board's culm-segment navigation, leaf-angle dividers, dashboard structure, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Required visible sections: Bamboo Forest, Monsoon Grove, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background from deep grove ink and wet earth shadow, text from straw light, primary accents from green culm, secondary accents from leaf green and bamboo leaf, focus accents from culm gold, subtle mist borders, bamboo node overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: dark buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command search, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, and simple icon treatment.
Composition: one comprehensive dark board, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Bamboo Forest".
